entities.coffee: a large cup of steaming coffee

scenes.title: The Café
scenes.background_prompt: A sidewalk café with a small round marble table, a wrought-iron chair, a menu board, potted plants, and a cobblestone street. Autumn morning. No people, no drinks.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A sidewalk café on a crisp autumn morning. A woman in a burgundy scarf and tan trench coat sits at a small round marble table on a wrought-iron chair. In front of her, a large white ceramic cup of coffee sits on a saucer, with thick curls of steam rising from the dark surface. The woman wraps both hands around the cup for warmth, her breath faintly visible in the cool air. A folded newspaper and a croissant on a small plate sit on the table beside the cup. Potted ferns in terra-cotta pots line the café entrance. A chalkboard menu leans against the doorframe listing specials. The cobblestone street gleams with dampness from early morning drizzle, and fallen leaves in yellow and brown are scattered about.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place woman at the small marble table, sitting and wrapping both hands around a large white cup of coffee with steam rising. Place the cup on a saucer on the table, with a croissant and newspaper beside it.
scenes.scene_description: In the lower-left foreground, a cobblestone street composed of rounded grey and brown stones extends toward the center. To the left of the street is a patch of green grass dotted with small white, pink, and yellow flowers. Behind the grass stands a row of three trees with rounded canopies in shades of yellow, orange, and green. Moving right along the sidewalk, two wooden A-frame signs stand near the edge of the street; the left sign displays a menu with illustrations of a coffee cup, a croissant, and a sandwich, while the right sign is blank. Further right, a woman with brown hair tied in a ponytail sits in a black wrought-iron chair at a small, round grey table. She wears a blue long-sleeved shirt, a yellow apron with a front pocket, brown pants, and brown shoes. She is smiling and holding a white cup of hot coffee with a swirl of white steam rising from it. On the table in front of her sits a white plate with a golden-brown croissant and a folded newspaper. To her right is an empty black wrought-iron chair. Several terracotta pots containing green bushes and spiky plants are placed around the seating area, with a few fallen orange leaves scattered on the ground. Behind the woman is the cafe building, featuring large glass windows and a brown wooden door under a striped orange and white awning. To the right of the cafe, a large tree with a thick brown trunk and a canopy of green and orange leaves frames the scene. In the background, simple silhouettes of buildings and houses are visible under a light blue sky filled with soft, fluffy white clouds, suggesting a clear autumn morning or afternoon.

smiling woman wearing a yellow apron

clear autumn morning with fluffy clouds

the coffee is served hot and steaming
